mapper.select: SELECT 'SafetyMonitoring' AS title ,'/SafetyMonitoring' AS route ,'SafetyMonitoringDesc' AS description , 'Y' as activeYn UNION ALL SELECT 'SafetyMonitoringHistory' AS title ,'/SafetyMonitoringHistory' AS route ,'SafetyMonitoringHistoryDesc' AS description , 'Y' as activeYn UNION ALL SELECT 'SafetyVideoServerManage' AS title ,'/SafetyVideoServerManage' AS route ,'SafetyVideoServerManageDesc' AS description , 'Y' as activeYn UNION ALL SELECT 'SafetyDetectionCameraManage' AS title ,'/SafetyDetectionCameraManage' AS route ,'SafetyDetectionCameraManageDesc' AS description , 'Y' as activeYn UNION ALL SELECT 'SafetyMonitoringManage' AS title ,'/SafetyMonitoringManage' AS route ,'SafetyMonitoringManageDesc' AS description , 'Y' as activeYn UNION ALL SELECT 'SafetyMonitoringZoneManage' AS title ,'/SafetyMonitoringZoneManage' AS route ,'SafetyMonitoringZoneManageDesc' AS description , 'Y' as activeYn
